meta.title: Daily Web & Product Ideas
meta.refreshNote: One practical website or app idea every morning.

items.title: Idea of the Day: Salon booking slot
items.summary: Pick service → pick slot → WhatsApp confirm.
items.proof: Buildable pattern — see live demos on ai-workflows.cloud/#showcase
items.body: No app install; owner sees calendar.

items.title: Idea of the Day: Restaurant kitchen board
items.summary: Web kitchen screen synced with WhatsApp orders.
items.proof: Buildable pattern — see live demos on ai-workflows.cloud/#showcase
items.body: Reduces missed tickets vs paper chits.

items.title: Idea of the Day: Coaching daily tip
items.summary: One tip per day + admission CTA for coaching centers.
items.proof: Buildable pattern — see live demos on ai-workflows.cloud/#showcase
items.body: Parents bookmark; institute gets steady enquiries.

items.title: Idea of the Day: Local shop catalog
items.summary: WhatsApp catalog + simple website for a neighborhood store.
items.proof: Buildable pattern — see live demos on ai-workflows.cloud/#showcase
items.body: Shops upload products; customers browse prices before visiting.

items.title: Idea of the Day: Cyber cafe form AI
items.summary: Scan ID → auto-fill forms → staff review.
items.proof: Buildable pattern — see live demos on ai-workflows.cloud/#showcase
items.body: More customers per hour at cafés.

items.title: Idea of the Day: Distributor OTP delivery
items.summary: Shop orders → rider OTP → owner dashboard.
items.proof: Buildable pattern — see live demos on ai-workflows.cloud/#showcase
items.body: Proof of delivery reduces disputes.
